curation_notes: Patch modifies only svglib/svglib.py (1 source file). The fix adds resolve_entities=False to etree.XMLParser in load_svg_file and threads the parameter through svg2rlg. Pre-assigned class xxe is correct — CWE-611 maps directly to XXE and the patch disables external entity resolution in the XML parser. Locations derived from the patch diff: load_svg_file creates the vulnerable parser, svg2rlg is the public entry point that exposes it. No sibling files contain the same pattern — svglib.py is the sole module with XML parsing logic.
